zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Munchensy於大約1152年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可古德斯東時，他的父親Warin de Munchensy41歲，母親Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire28歲。他於1184年與Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex在英國英格蘭諾福爾可古德斯東結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1204年5月7日之前在英國英格蘭肯特達特福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Munchensy于大约1152年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可古德斯東时，他的父亲Warin de Munchensy41岁，母亲Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire28岁。他于1184年与Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex在英国英格兰諾福爾可古德斯東结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1204年5月7日之前在英国英格兰肯特達特福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Munchensy was born about 1152, in Gooderstone, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Warin de Munchensy, was 41 and his mother, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, was 28. He married Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex in 1184, in Gooderstone, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 7 May 1204, in Dartford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Munchensy est né environ 1152, à Gooderstone, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Warin de Munchensy, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex en 1184, à Gooderstone, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 7 mai 1204, à Dartford, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Munchensy um 1152 in Gooderstone, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Warin de Munchensy 41 und seine Mutter Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire 28. Er hat 1184 in Gooderstone, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 7. Mai 1204 in Dartford, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Munchensy è nato il circa 1152 nel Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Warin de Munchensy, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex nel 1184, nel Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 7 maggio 1204, nel Dartford, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Munchensyが約1152年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグダーストーンで生まれた時，父Warin de Munchensyは41歳，母Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshireは28歳であった。1184年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクグダーストーンでAveline de Clare Countess of Essexと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1204年5月7日以前にイギリスイギリスケントダルトフォードで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Munchensy(이)가 대략 1152년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 구더스톤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Warin de Munchensy(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1184년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 구더스톤에서 Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1204년 5월 7일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 더르트퍼드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Munchensy nasceu aproximadamente 1152, em Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Warin de Munchensy, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex em 1184, em Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 7 de maio de 1204, em Dartford, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Munchensy родился около 1152 г. в местности гудирстоун, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Warin de Munchensy было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex в 1184 г. в местности гудирстоун, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 7 май 1204 г. в местности дартфорд, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Munchensy nació aproximadamente 1152, en Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Warin de Munchensy, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnes FitzPayn Countess of Herefordshire, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Aveline de Clare Countess of Essex en 1184, en Gooderstone, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 7 de mayo de 1204, en Dartford, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
